config.name: fortinet_fortigate_candidate_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: fortinet_fortigate_candidate_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (4001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:18:02.949748

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local patterns = {
    severity = {
        information = 1,
        critical = 5, 
        emergency = 6
    },
    action = {
        accept = "Open",
        permit = "Open",
        dropped = "Close",
        close = "Close",
        shutdown = "Close",
        clear_session = "Reset",
        block = "Refuse",
        blocked = "Refuse"
    }
}

-- Optimized transformation function
function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize output with local variables
    local output = {
        class_uid = 4001,
        class_name = "Network Activity",
        category_uid = 4,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                name = "FortiGate",
                vendor = "Fortinet"
            }
        }
    }

    -- Initialize nested tables efficiently
    local src_endpoint = {}
    local dst_endpoint = {}
    local event = {}
    local traffic = {}

    -- Extract Fortinet fields with null checks
    local fortinet = record.fortinet or {}
    
    -- Map source endpoint details
    if fortinet.srcip then
        src_endpoint.ip = fortinet.srcip
        event.source = fortinet.srcip
    end
    if fortinet.srcport then 
        src_endpoint.port = tonumber(fortinet.srcport)
    end
    if fortinet.srcmac then
        src_endpoint.mac = fortinet.srcmac
    end

    -- Map destination endpoint details
    if fortinet.dstip then
        dst_endpoint.ip = fortinet.dstip
        event.target = fortinet.dstip
    end
    if fortinet.dstport then
        dst_endpoint.port = tonumber(fortinet.dstport)
    end
    if fortinet.dstmac then
        dst_endpoint.mac = fortinet.dstmac
    end

    -- Map network activity details
    if fortinet.action then
        event.network = {
            connectionStatus = patterns.action[fortinet.action:lower()] or fortinet.action
        }
    end
    if fortinet.service then
        event.network.protocolName = fortinet.service
    end
    if fortinet.subtype then
        event.network.direction = fortinet.subtype
        event.type = fortinet.subtype
    end

    -- Map traffic metrics
    if fortinet.sentbyte then
        traffic.bytes_in = tonumber(fortinet.sentbyte)
    end
    if fortinet.rcvdbyte then
        traffic.bytes_out = tonumber(fortinet.rcvdbyte)
    end

    -- Map severity with lookup table
    if fortinet.severity then
        local sev = fortinet.severity:lower()
        output.severity_id = patterns.severity[sev] or 99
    end

    -- Set activity details based on action
    if event.network and event.network.connectionStatus then
        local action = event.network.connectionStatus
        output.activity_name = string.format("Network Activity: %s", action)
        output.activity_id = patterns.action[action:lower()] and 1 or 99
        output.type_uid = string.format("4001%02d", output.activity_id)
    end

    -- Assign constructed objects
    output.src_endpoint = src_endpoint
    output.dst_endpoint = dst_endpoint
    output.event = event
    output.traffic = traffic

    -- Generate observables array
    if fortinet.srcip or fortinet.dstip or fortinet.dstmac then
        local observables = {}
        if fortinet.srcip then
            table.insert(observables, {
                type_id = "2",
                type = "IP Address",
                name = "fortinet.srcip",
                value = fortinet.srcip
            })
        end
        if fortinet.dstip then
            table.insert(observables, {
                type_id = "2", 
                type = "IP Address",
                name = "fortinet.dstip",
                value = fortinet.dstip
            })
        end
        if fortinet.dstmac then
            table.insert(observables, {
                type_id = "3",
                type = "MAC Address", 
                name = "fortinet.dstmac",
                value = fortinet.dstmac
            })
        end
        output.observables = observables
    end

    -- Add timestamp if not present
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    return output
end
